title: Xi Urges Biden, NATO To Speak To Putin, Tells US To Back Off On Taiwan Issue
description: Xi Jinping urged Joe Biden to ensure his administration and ally NATO sit down for direct talks with Russia to deescalate the crisis in Ukraine. During his vide...
keywords: Taiwan, China, Taiwan US relations, Beijing Washington relations
